---
title: "PhD-Level Numerical PDEs"
---

<p>
  <a href="pdf/NumericalPDEs.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    📖 Open in new tab
  </a> |
  <a href="pdf/NumericalPDEs.pdf" download>
    📄 Download PDF
  </a>
</p>

<div class="responsive-pdf">
  <iframe src="pdf/NumericalPDEs.pdf" frameborder="0"></iframe>
</div>
